ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyTransformationFeature1: When either 4 Gold Striker symbols, 4 Red Keeper symbols, 4 Purple Defender symbols, 4 Blue Winger symbols or 4 Green Midfielder symbols appear on reel 3, the Players Transformation Feature is triggered.
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyTransformationFeature2: During the Players Transformation Feature, any player symbols on reels 1, 2, 4 and 5 will be transformed into the same player symbol in reel 3.
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere on reels 2, 3 and 4 will trigger the Free Spins Feature.
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, 5 player symbols with the corresponding number of awarded free spins and maximum win will be shown.
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: Tap on one of the 5 player symbols to make a selection, then tap on the Start button to start the Free Spins Feature. The selected symbol will be the only player symbol during the Free Spins Feature.
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: If no player selection is made after 30 seconds, a player will be randomly chosen. If a player is selected and the Start button is not pressed after 30 seconds, the Start button will be automatically pressed.
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature5: The Gold Striker, the Red Keeper, the Purple Defender, the Blue Winger and the Green Midfielder selections award 4, 6, 8, 10 and 12 free spins respectively.
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature6: Selection with fewer free spins have higher volatility (higher risk with higher win potential).
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature7: Scatter symbol does not appear during free spin.
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.
ShaolinSoccerPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: Scatter symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.

ShaolinSoccerRules.GeneralRules1: Shaolin Soccer is a 5-reel, 4-row video slot featuring symbol transformations and 5 symbol choices in Free Spins Feature.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 25 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

ShaolinSoccerRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
